# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1   # Version of API group that you are using (v1 in this case) 
kind: Deployment    # Kind specifies the object type - a deployment is one way to manage stateful applications like pods, etc. for Kubernetes objects    
metadata:           # Information about your deployed application/object which includes name and namespace  
  name: myapp-deploy       # Name of app in k8s cluster (e.g., 'myapp')     
spec:               # Specification on how to create the deployment object - see below for all options    
  replicas: <replicas_count>    # Number of pod copies that should exist simultaneously  
                              # This can also be a label query like app=<your-chart>  which says "only track changes in our chart"     
                                  # For example, it would only update when the image is changed or if an object with same name already exists      
  selector:     # Metadata that Kubernetes uses to find pods associated w/ Deployment. This must match metadata label selectors  
    matchLabels:        # Define which app=<your-chart> labels get selected for replication (e.g., key1 = value, key2 = value)     
      <match_labels>  # Specify the matching criteria in yaml file to use as base    
  template:       # Kubernetes pods are created from this object and configured within a PodSpec - below is an example of what that could look like for your app       
    metadata:               # Information about user's application which includes name  
      labels:                <labels>  # Define the label requirements when scheduling to work with our chart (e.g., color=red, size=medium) 
        <label_selectors>     # Specify matching criteria in yaml file for base object   
      <container-name> <imageName>>   <command>`     <<args
